title: Cicada
overview: Cicada movie is a gripping survival thriller about an unscrupulous man whose journey through the jungle reveals a harsh truth: In the jungle, there is only one law: hunt to satisfy hunger. If the hunt is to serve other desires, the hunter will become the hunted.
